query: SELECT afericao, COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(SUM(CAST(quantidade AS DECIMAL(12,3))), 3) as litros_total, ROUND(SUM(CAST(valor_total AS DECIMAL(12,2))), 2) as valor_total FROM vendas GROUP BY afericao ORDER BY afericao;
